message:
feat: add --no-cache, --db, --baseline-info, --check-drift, --related-include-closed CLI flags

- Add find_related_work_with_options() with include_closed parameter to
  file_intel, preserving backward compat via existing find_related_work()
- Wire --related-include-closed flag through robot-related output path
- Implement --baseline-info to display saved baseline metadata without
  loading issue data
- Implement --check-drift for human-readable drift detection output
- Accept --no-cache (Go CLI compat, no-op) and --db (resolves beads file
  path when --beads-file not set)
- Add workspace-root auto-discovery e2e test proving implicit
  .bv/workspace.yaml detection works without --workspace flag
- Unit tests for all new CLI flags and related-work closed filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
